approach_rationale: Approach A (Conservative / output:export) chosen: entire app is client-side with IndexedDB; static export matches the use-case perfectly, eliminates SSR complexity, and reduces build risk. output:'standalone' would add unnecessary Node.js server overhead for a wholly browser-side app.
persistence_strategy: IndexedDB via idb library, openDB('littlebridge', 1). Five object stores: vocabulary, progress, settings, sessions, songs. All user data (childName, childAge, pinHash, onboardingComplete, word progress, sessions) written to IndexedDB on every mutation. Singleton DB hook ensures one connection across the app. No in-memory primary stores — DB is source of truth.
error_handling_approach: Every DB call wrapped in try/catch; errors surface as user-visible state (error component or toast fallback). Audio errors are non-fatal: console.warn + audioError boolean flag shown as disabled AudioButton. Image 404s → graceful placeholder via onError handler on Next/Image. Route-level errors caught by src/app/error.tsx (client ErrorBoundary). 404s caught by src/app/not-found.tsx.

steps.title: Initialize project files
steps.description: Create package.json with all required deps (idb, howler, framer-motion, canvas-confetti, clsx, tailwind-merge, sharp), tsconfig.json, run npm install.

steps.title: Build & CSS config
steps.description: Create next.config.ts (output:'export', images.unoptimized:true, no telemetry), tailwind.config.ts (custom palette, Nunito+Fredoka fonts, custom keyframes), postcss.config.mjs, jest.config.ts, jest.setup.ts.

steps.title: TypeScript types
steps.description: Define all types: VocabularyWord, WordProgress, Setting, Session, Song, LyricLine, Category, ActivityType, MasteryLevel, MoodType.

steps.title: Utility libraries
steps.description: cn() clsx+tailwind-merge, shuffleArray, formatDate, slugify in utils.ts. hashPIN + verifyPIN using Web Crypto in crypto.ts.

steps.title: Data seeds + DB layer
steps.description: vocabulary-seed.ts: 20 VocabularyWords across 4 categories. songs-seed.ts: empty stub array. db.ts: openDB with 5 stores + typed helpers. DB helper functions all return typed values with error handling.

steps.title: Progress + Audio libs
steps.description: progress.ts: updateWordProgress (mastery levels), getWeeklyStats, recordSession. audio.ts: AudioManager class wrapping Howler, singleton export, iOS unlock logic.

steps.title: React hooks
steps.description: useDB: singleton DB open. useProgress: wraps progress lib. useAudio: wraps AudioManager, attaches iOS unlock listener on mount.

steps.title: App shell
steps.description: globals.css (Tailwind imports + CSS vars + touch tweaks). layout.tsx (Nunito+Fredoka One via next/font, html lang=zh-CN, viewport meta, bilingual metadata). error.tsx. not-found.tsx.

steps.title: UI primitives
steps.description: ProgressBar (Framer Motion animated fill). PinPad (3x4 grid, 4-circle display, backspace, auto-submit at 4 digits, shake on error). AudioButton (88px circular, pulse-ring animation, error state). VocabularyCard (Next/Image with placeholder fallback, 3 text levels, Framer Motion tap). CelebrationOverlay (canvas-confetti on mount, star stagger, bilingual text, two action buttons).

steps.title: ChildLayout
steps.description: Max-w-428px wrapper. Fixed coral home button (88px, bottom-right, z-50) hidden on '/' via usePathname. Children prop + showHomeButton prop.

steps.title: Onboarding step components
steps.description: Extract each of the 5 wizard steps into separate components to keep onboarding/page.tsx under 150 lines.

steps.title: Onboarding page
steps.description: AnimatePresence wizard controller. State machine: step 0-4. Stores form data across steps. On step 5 completion: writes all settings to IndexedDB, navigates to /.

steps.title: HomeScreen + root page
steps.description: HomeScreen: greeting, 2x2 activity grid, start-session CTA, daily word count, panda mascot stub. Root page: reads onboardingComplete from DB, shows HomeScreen or redirects to /onboarding, loading spinner during check.

steps.title: ExploreCards activity
steps.description: ExploreCards component: loads 6 random words from DB, one card at a time, progress dots, audio on tap, tracks seen words, records session, triggers CelebrationOverlay on completion. explore-cards page.tsx wraps component in ChildLayout.

steps.title: Public assets
steps.description: Create public/images/placeholder.png (1px coral-tinted PNG) and public/images/vocabulary/ directory placeholder. Audio dirs noted but not seeded (Task 1 scope note).

steps.title: Tests
steps.description: Write tests: utils.test.ts, crypto.test.ts, PinPad.test.tsx, VocabularyCard.test.tsx, CelebrationOverlay.test.tsx, ExploreCards.test.tsx. Run npm test to verify.

steps.title: Final checks + push
steps.description: Run npm test. Fix any failures. git add, commit, push branch.

cases: shuffleArray returns same elements in different order
shuffleArray does not mutate input array
verifyPIN returns true for correct PIN
verifyPIN returns false for wrong PIN
each digit button is at least 88px (min-w/h class present)
does not show actual digits in display
renders image with fallback on error

risk_areas.risk: Tailwind CSS v4 vs v3 syntax conflict
risk_areas.description: Task specifies Tailwind v4 but also describes tailwind.config.ts (v3 pattern) and @tailwind base/components/utilities (v3 syntax). Resolution: use Tailwind v4 CSS-first approach with @import 'tailwindcss' in globals.css and define custom theme via @theme directive; also create tailwind.config.ts as v4-compatible config file used via @config directive.

risk_areas.risk: IndexedDB unavailable during Next.js static build
risk_areas.description: output:'export' generates HTML at build time; any code that calls window/indexedDB at module level will crash the build. Resolution: all DB access is inside 'use client' components, only called in useEffect/event handlers, never at module top-level or in server components.
Howler accesses window on import. Resolution: dynamic import Howler inside AudioManager constructor, check typeof window !== 'undefined' guard.
canvas-confetti requires DOM canvas. Resolution: dynamic import inside CelebrationOverlay's useEffect (client-only), wrapped in 'use client'.

risk_areas.risk: next/font not supported with output:export in some Next.js 15 versions
risk_areas.description: next/font/google requires network access or font files. Resolution: configure next/font with display:swap and fallback fonts; fonts download at build time.
Onboarding has 5 steps. If inline, page.tsx would exceed 200 lines. Resolution: extract each step to src/components/onboarding/Step*.tsx files.

iOS Safari requires a user gesture before AudioContext can play. Resolution: audioManager.unlockAudioContext() called in onboarding Step 1 'Get Started' click handler; useAudio hook attaches window click listener on iOS detected.

All 20 vocabulary word audio and image files are referenced but not yet created. Resolution: VocabularyCard uses Next/Image blurDataURL + onError fallback to /images/placeholder.png; AudioButton shows error state on Howler load failure without crashing.
